data.title: $1000 Invested In This Stock 5 Years Ago Would Be Worth $2,800 Today
What's Going On With Netflix Shares Friday?
data.description: Netflix shares are moving higher on Friday after the company reported better-than-expected 2024 third-quarter fiscal earnings on Thursday after the market closed.

data.title: Merck Virus Treatment Shows 60.4% Effectiveness, Reduces Certain Infections In Infants
data.description: Merck announces positive results from Phase 2b/3 and interim Phase 3 trials of a monoclonal antibody designed to protect infants from RSV.

data.title: Alibaba Eyes Double-Digit Growth for Singles' Day in Hong Kong, Waives Delivery Fees
data.description: Alibaba's Singles' Day campaign in Hong Kong expects double-digit growth with new free shipping promotion and government stimulus.

data.title: Cannabis Can Be A 'Great Tool In Dealing With Adversity,' Says Former NFL Star Ricky Williams
data.description: Ricky Williams advocates for cannabis in sports and beyond, sharing how it helped him cope with the pressures of football.
